title: Nonce N_S returned in error messages.
Confirmed key redistribution vs. incrementing version number
Generation of security parameters upon membership change.
Fix retrieval of group vs. group+individual keying material.
Justify the size of the nonces N_S and N_C as shares of the signature challenge.
New TLS EXPORTER label to generate a signature challenge
addition about rekeying
body: AP7: Specify that when using the OSCORE profile between group member and GM, the joining nodes need to have both client and server roles. This means configuring their keying material accordingly. In particular, the group member’s recipient context need to contain a replay window).

title: Editorial
body: AP6: In Section 6, third bullet point, clarify about ensuring that any signature algorithm parameters that might exist are going to be checked and enforced.

title: PoP of signature key
body: AP5: In Section 6, proof-of-possession of the client’s private key, e.g. by signing a nonce returned by the GM in the response to the Token post.

title: Editorial
body: AP4: In Section 6, clarify in the third bullet on asymmetric PoP.

title: error code
body: AP10: Section 4.3 - GM refuses the join request with 4.xx if the client_cred passed in was not in the correct format.

title: Editorial
body: AP3: In Section 4.4.1, about 'key_info', change "its format" to "its exact content".

title: Extend key_info
body: AP2: In Section 4.1, extend the format of ‘key_info’

title: Sec cons
body: AP9: add sec cons that this is up to the application to decide what to do with collisions of Gid

title: Terminology
body: AP8: Switch to Requester, Responder, Monitor

title: Editorial
body: AP1: In the abstract, change “where communications are based” to “where the group communication is based”.
